## Checklist

- [ ] One concern per PR (split unrelated changes)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased section)
- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] `npm run lint && npm test` passes locally
- [ ] DCO sign-off present in commits (`git commit -s`)

## Out-of-scope check

I confirm this PR does NOT add (per CONTRIBUTING.md):

- [ ] A new emitter (Selenium / Cypress / UiPath / Playwright Java/Python)
- [ ] Self-healing / diff-and-propose logic
- [ ] Authenticated-crawl / storageState plumbing in the CLI
- [ ] Any telemetry or phone-home behavior
